# Umazen TikTok Tools

> Free web app to download TikTok videos (no watermark where available) and extract still frames.

## Canonical URLs
- https://umazen-tiktok-tools.netlify.app/
- https://umazen-tiktok-tools.netlify.app/terms.html
- https://umazen-tiktok-tools.netlify.app/llms-full.txt

## Product Summary
Umazen TikTok Tools is a browser-based utility for:
- Downloading public TikTok videos in best available quality
- Extracting PNG frames from uploaded videos with custom frame count and interval

## Usage Guidelines
- Intended for educational and personal use
- Users must follow creator rights, local law, and TikTok Terms
- Tool is not affiliated with TikTok or ByteDance

## Core Features
- No-signup TikTok downloader
- High-quality output preference
- In-browser frame extraction
- Mobile and desktop compatible UI

## Support
- Terms: https://umazen-tiktok-tools.netlify.app/terms.html
